{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Nakothi's heart
| introduced = ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The heart of the [[Dead Mother]] is gray-green in color.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c3">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
